calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Req. For Court Judgment By Default
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ernst Halperin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 1244 SUTTER STREET, LLC, a California limited liability company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WANTFUL, INC., a Delaware corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Daniel Rabin sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the premises located at 1244-1268 Sutter Street, San Francisco, CA 94109
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent $80,976.32
Holdover damages $11,788.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,437.95
Costs: $565.95
Other: $60,000.00 Rent-abatement tenant inducement recapture pursuant to Lease paragraph 4.03.
Total Judgment in the amount of $158,768.22
Judgment signed in open court.
